extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won the bunch sprint by narrowest margin over JAKOBSEN Fabio after Lotto-Jumbo controlled breakaway on short leash throughout wet stage
tactical_patterns: Lotto-Jumbo controlled entire stage for GROENEWEGEN despite wet conditions, revealing team commitment even when sprint uncertain
KAVANAUGH Rémi collected bonus seconds at two intermediate sprints from breakaway, signaling GC ambition before stage 4 mountains
Bora-Hansgrohe delivered textbook leadout despite letting Lotto control pace, suggesting confidence in ACKERMANN's pure speed over positioning

rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: vanquished in sprint despite team controlling all day, losing to ACKERMANN's superior pure speed
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: won against quality sprint field despite Lotto-Jumbo controlling tempo, fourth WorldTour win of 2018 confirms emerging top-tier status
rider_signals.KAVANAUGH Rémi: positive: aggressively collected bonus seconds at both intermediate sprints, tactical preparation for GC attempt on mountain stage 4
rider_signals.GRIVKO Andriy: neutral: second consecutive day in breakaway suggests form present but Astana lacks sprint option to capitalize
